query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as stale_count FROM taskCompletion WHERE organizationId = 240001 AND notionLastEdited IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) as stale_count FROM validationResults WHERE organizationId = 240001 AND notionLastEdited IS NULL;
